candidates.action_support: v5.4 contains rho and a scale bridge, but rho_* is symbolic unless derived
candidates.dimensional_closure: R_BH gives M_BH proportional to 1/R_BH only after ell_* or R_BH is fixed
candidates.name: geometric radius
candidates.scale_equation: delta S / delta R = 0 can be written only after selecting a radius potential
candidates.stability: depends on the missing rho Hessian/source
candidates.uniqueness: continuous modulus if no potential fixes R_BH
candidates.verdict: not selected as primary because a free radius is not scale generation

candidates.action_support: extends v5.4 L_topographic and L_scale with a minimal internal scale potential
candidates.name: scalar/topographic vacuum
candidates.stability: stable nonzero branch when alpha_scale>0 and beta_scale>0
candidates.uniqueness: unique magnitude, two sign branches identified by a Z2 orientation unless the action breaks it
candidates.verdict: strongest surviving mechanism; conditional because M_* and coefficient provenance remain open

candidates.action_support: v5.4 has kinetic and Hessian spectra
candidates.name: spectral mechanism
candidates.stability: operator positivity can be tested after domain closure
candidates.uniqueness: depends on spectrum and boundary domain
candidates.verdict: useful propagation map, not a primary scale source

candidates.action_support: no artifact-backed beta function, determinant anomaly, or stationary effective action exists
candidates.dimensional_closure: no dimensional transmutation scale can be emitted
candidates.name: dynamical or transmutation mechanism
candidates.scale_equation: no closed beta(g) or dGamma_eff/dmu equation

claim_boundary: BHSM v5.5 constructs a conditional scale-setting mechanism from the v5.4 action. It fixes a nonzero dimensionless scale branch in terms of symbolic action coefficients, but the absolute unit anchor M_* or ell_* remains open. No measured mass, coupling, W calibration, CKM fit, neutrino limit, cosmological input, rare-B result, or full BHSM completion is claimed.
